permitted: Personal and household services (alteration, shoe repair, beauty/barber, jewelry/watch repair, small appliance repair, spas, chiropractors, massage therapy, holistic healing, gymnasiums, catering)

prohibited: Automotive service uses (gasoline stations, repair/service, car washes)
Drive-in/drive-thru window facilities

Public, private, or parochial schools

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ord. Art. VIII § 8.6, Table No. 4 (Town Center Zone District); uses § 8.1–8.2
zones.notes: Single base district 'TC (Town Center)' per Art. IV § 4.1 but Table No. 4 splits standards into two sub-categories. TC Commercial (recorded here): lot area 3,000 sf, height 30 ft, all setbacks 0, lot coverage may be 100% per footnote b (recorded TBD as no single max % stated), distance between buildings 0 (per IBC/Fire Code). TC Residential variant: lot area 5,000 sf, height 24 ft, front 20, side 10, street-side 20, rear 25, lot coverage 60%, distance 6 ft. No FAR/stories/density stated.

Commercial kennels, animal shelters, veterinary hospitals with outdoor boarding/exercise
conditional: All uses requiring CUP in C-1 and C-2 Zone Districts
Wireless communication towers/antennas not on Town-controlled property
prohibited: Uses not listed as permitted or conditional within the district (subject to similar-use determination by P&Z)
